articles.title_en: There was a fire in a house in the center of Moscow
articles.lead_en: In one of the apartments, personal belongings and furniture caught fire, the press service of the Russian Ministry of Emergency Situations for the city said.
articles.title_raw: В центре Москвы произошел пожар в доме
articles.lead_raw: В одной из квартир загорелись личные вещи и мебель, рассказали в пресс-службе ГУ МЧС России по городу

articles.title_en: Ukraine’s strike on Russian retail giant Wildberries’ warehouses may have cost sellers at least 150 billion rubles
articles.lead_en: Overnight on July 18, Ukraine attacked two warehouses belonging to Wildberries, Russia’s largest online marketplace, citing the fact that drone components were stored there. Eight people were killed and more than 80 were injured.
articles.title_raw: Ukraine’s strike on Russian retail giant Wildberries’ warehouses may have cost sellers at least 150 billion rubles
articles.lead_raw: Overnight on July 18, Ukraine attacked two warehouses belonging to Wildberries, Russia’s largest online marketplace, citing the fact that drone components were stored there. Eight people were killed and more than 80 were injured.

articles.title_en: Photos show massive fires after Ukraine strikes Russian retailer Wildberries’ warehouses for the second time in a week
articles.lead_en: Ukrainian drones struck Wildberries logistics centers in Krasnodar and Nevinnomyssk, in Stavropol Krai, in the early hours of July 22, setting off large fires. Helicopters from the Russian Emergency Ministry were deployed to help fight the blazes.
articles.title_raw: Photos show massive fires after Ukraine strikes Russian retailer Wildberries’ warehouses for the second time in a week
articles.lead_raw: Ukrainian drones struck Wildberries logistics centers in Krasnodar and Nevinnomyssk, in Stavropol Krai, in the early hours of July 22, setting off large fires. Helicopters from the Russian Emergency Ministry were deployed to help fight the blazes.

articles.title_en: One killed, 10 others injured in massive drone attack on Russia’s Krasnodar Region
articles.lead_en: Fragments of a drone landed on the premises of an industrial site in Armavir, killing one employee, Governor Veniamin Kondratyev specified
articles.title_raw: One killed, 10 others injured in massive drone attack on Russia’s Krasnodar Region
articles.lead_raw: Fragments of a drone landed on the premises of an industrial site in Armavir, killing one employee, Governor Veniamin Kondratyev specified

articles.title_en: In Nevinnomyssk, after a UAV strike on a Wildberries warehouse, a state of emergency was declared
articles.lead_en: A fire helicopter from the Russian Ministry of Emergency Situations begins work at the site, said regional governor Vladimir Vladimirov.
articles.title_raw: В Невинномысске после удара БПЛА по складу Wildberries объявили режим ЧС
articles.lead_raw: На объекте начинает работу пожарный вертолет МЧС России, сообщил губернатор региона Владимир Владимиров

articles.title_en: A legitimate target or a war crime? Russian commentators can’t agree on Ukraine’s Wildberries strikes.
articles.lead_en: Overnight on July 18, Ukrainian drones struck Wildberries warehouse complexes in Elektrostal (outside Moscow) and Kotovsk (Tambov region). Eight people were killed and dozens were injured; preliminary estimates put sellers’ losses at more than 150 billion rubles, according to Meduza.
articles.title_raw: A legitimate target or a war crime? Russian commentators can’t agree on Ukraine’s Wildberries strikes.
articles.lead_raw: Overnight on July 18, Ukrainian drones struck Wildberries warehouse complexes in Elektrostal (outside Moscow) and Kotovsk (Tambov region). Eight people were killed and dozens were injured; preliminary estimates put sellers’ losses at more than 150 billion rubles, according to Meduza.

articles.title_en: ‘We lived in peace, and now they’re bombing us’: Ukraine hit two huge Wildberries warehouses near Moscow and in Tambov, killing eight. A correspondent went to see how one town is coping.
articles.lead_en: Overnight on July 18, Ukrainian forces struck two of the largest warehouses operated by Wildberries, the Russian online retailer — one in Elektrostal, outside Moscow, and the other in Kotovsk, a small city in the Tambov region, near the regional capital. The two attacks left 80 people injured, and eight employees at the Kotovsk warehouse were killed.
articles.title_raw: ‘We lived in peace, and now they’re bombing us’: Ukraine hit two huge Wildberries warehouses near Moscow and in Tambov, killing eight. A correspondent went to see how one town is coping.
articles.lead_raw: Overnight on July 18, Ukrainian forces struck two of the largest warehouses operated by Wildberries, the Russian online retailer — one in Elektrostal, outside Moscow, and the other in Kotovsk, a small city in the Tambov region, near the regional capital. The two attacks left 80 people injured, and eight employees at the Kotovsk warehouse were killed.

articles.title_en: Eight killed, 77 injured in Ukrainian attacks on Belgorod over past day
articles.lead_en: The Ukrainian armed forces attacked Russia’s Belgorod Region 153 times
